title: Smarter discovery and deeper diagnostics
highlights: Tool discovery can suggest missing catalog capabilities for review when no existing integration fits
Server memory incidents now include actionable diagnostics and support selecting historical incidents for analysis
Gmail draft actions render complete previews directly in the terminal
improvements: Pro Max and Ultra subscription tiers are recognized with the correct model access
Imported provider accounts prefer the strongest quality-first model available
Windows installation and release assets now have production-ready signing, verification, and documentation
LaTeX renders in blue for clearer visual separation
Tool discovery results and todo cards use more compact, focused presentation
fixes: Production telemetry events are delivered to the configured worker again
GPT-5.6 Sol can be selected directly through OpenAI routes
Cold-cache notices remain on one line instead of disrupting the transcript layout
